content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Finished multi-file editing feature. Exact changes: (1) _termui_impl.py: renamed Editor.edit_file(self, filename: str) to Editor.edit_files(self, filenames: cabc.Iterable[str]), builds a space-joined quoted filename string and passes to subprocess.Popen; updated Editor.edit()'s internal call from self.edit_file(name) to self.edit_files((name,)). Did not touch Editor.__init__ or add any new params. (2) termui.py: edit()'s filename param type changed to str | cabc.Iterable[str] | None, added 2 @t.overload signatures for typing clarity, body now normalizes filename (str -> [filename], iterable -> list(filename)) then calls ed.edit_files(filenames). Added versionchanged 8.2.0 docstring note. (3) CHANGES.rst: added a changelog entry. All 62 termui tests + full suite (560 passed, pre-existing unrelated collection error in test_basic.py) pass. Your process_priority param placement (appended at end of signatures, not touching filename logic) should compose cleanly with this - my edit_files() signature only adds a 'filenames' param, doesn't touch the process_priority param you added. Ready for you to verify no conflicts on your end.
